Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: Mountain Meadows

programme.title: Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Full 60-Minute 4K Nature Film ✨ Journey into one of the most magical landscapes on Earth — Plitvice Lakes National Park, Croatia’s crown jewel of cascading waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and lush alpine forests. This full-length 60-minute cinematic nature film invites you to relax and explore the mesmerizing beauty of Europe’s oldest and most breathtaking national park, filmed in stunning 4K Ultra HD. Follow the flow of crystal-clear water as it connects 16 terraced lakes through a labyrinth of waterfalls, travertine pools, and forest pathways — a symphony of nature captured in its purest form. 🎬 Presented by NatureStream.tv, creators of Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 1: Slovenia, this film is part of our global nature series designed to inspire calm, mindfulness, and appreciation for Earth’s beauty.

It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. programme.title: Marcus Holman and the Moment He Became Obsessed with Lacrosse
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Marcus Holman - one of lacrosse’s greatest shooters and leaders - for an honest conversation about family, obsession, adversity, longevity, and chasing the all-time goals record. Marcus takes us back to his earliest memories from John's Hopkins’ locker room to the moment he fell in love with shooting He opens up about evolving his role, becoming a leader, sustaining greatness into his mid-30s, and what it would mean to cement his legacy in the record books.

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: New Zealand From Above

programme.title: Authentic Escapes
programme.desc: In this episode of Authentic Escapes, Sandra McLemore takes families on a journey where history and adventure come together in unforgettable ways. From navigating the hedge maze at Vienna’s Schönbrunn Palace—once a playground for royalty—to wandering t...

programme.title: Edible Nutmeg: On the Road
programme.desc: In this episode, we follow Chef Plum as he visits Gilbertie's Herb Garden in Easton, CT, to chat with owner Sal Gilbertie about his nursery where he tosses a delicious carrot and microgreen salad with fresh ricotta and a bacon-mustard vinaigrette.

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: Famed American western actor and singer Roy Rogers once again plays himself in this Jesse James tale that's a twist on the familiar formula. When he is summoned to bring Jesse to justice after the known villain is suspected of a bank robbery, Rogers so...

programme.title: Colorado Sundown
programme.desc: Murder among ranchers is the subject of this Republic Pictures drama. Starring such names as Rex Allen, Slim Pickins, and Chester Clute, this feature was directed by William Whitney. For Trivia Buffs: At one time Whitney was known as the youngest direc...

programme.title: Code of the Fearless
programme.desc: Fred Scott plays a lawman who goes undercover to expose a dangerous gang of criminals in this action-packed drama. He also has time to sing three songs: Cactus Pete, Gonna Ride, and Heres Romance. Screenwriter Fred Myton would go on to write such offbe...

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: What happens when Abraham Lincoln himself comes to New Mexico to discuss a treaty with Native American chief Acoma (Ted de Corsia)? Can the hotbed of emotions be quieted by cavalry Captain Hunt (Lew Ayres)? Or will the Captains superiors insist on prov...

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: Tex Ritter stars in this western drama about a man who goes undercover to befriend a convict believed to have stolen a shipment of government gold. Also starring Guy Wilkerson as Panhandle Perkins, this offering from Hollywoods Poverty Row features the...

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - On The Trail
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: Part III - The Plains
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price.

programme.title: Part IV - Return
programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite.

programme.title: Part I - The Vision
programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana.

programme.title: Pat Garrett and Billy the Kid
programme.desc: Garrett, an aging outlaw, becomes a sheriff and has to hunt down his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A young man wants an education despite his uncle's objection.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: Gene risks his life to track down some bandits as a special agent for a mining company.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: As a member of the Border Patrol, Gene helps a rancher who is being terrorized.

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E1 Belle Starr,,
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark pursues the legendary "Bandit Queen," Belle Starr, across the Oklahoma Territory. After Starr masterminds a series of daring train robberies, Clark must navigate her web of criminal associates and outsmart her clever deceptions to bring her to justice

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E20 The Wild Bunch of Wyoming
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark heads into the rugged Wyoming wilderness to track down the infamous Wild Bunch. Facing off against a highly organized gang of outlaws who know the terrain better than anyone, Clark must use all his wits to dismantle their stronghold and bring the gang to justice before they can pull off their next major heist

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 2 The Mission
programme.desc: While traveling through the desert, the Cartwrights encounter a distraught woman whose husband has been held captive by a reclusive tribe for years. Touched by her plight, the family decides to abandon their original plans to help her navigate the dangerous terrain and attempt a daring rescue mission

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E23 The Alexander Portlass Story
programme.desc: When a sophisticated British aristocrat joins the wagon train in search of ancient artifacts, his arrogant demeanor and obsession with his treasures clash with the realities of life on the trail, eventually leading to a tense struggle for survival against hostile desert conditions.

programme.title: The San Antonio Kid-Wild Bill Elliott
programme.desc: When a crooked gang terrorizes ranchers to seize their oil-rich land, Red Ryder intervenes, only to find himself targeted by a hired gunslinger who undergoes a change of heart after being saved by the hero

programme.title: Rock River Renegades 1942
programme.desc: In Rock River Renegades, the Range Busters roar back into action! When a dangerous gang stirs up trouble along Rock River, Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune saddle up to bring law and order to the frontier. With fast-paced gunfights, daring stunts, and Alibi’s trademark humor, this action-packed Western delivers all the thrills fans of the series love.

programme.title: Ridin' the Cherokee Trail 1941
programme.desc: In Ridin’ the Cherokee Trail, Tex Ritter sings and rides into a frontier torn by corruption and outlaw rule. When a gang of schemers threatens to take control of a vital stage line, Tex steps in with his six-gun, courage, and a song to rally the people. Blending fast-paced action, trailblazing heroics, and Ritter’s trademark melodies, this Western delivers justice on the open range.

programme.title: Between God, The Devil, and a Winchester
programme.desc: A man gains access to a treasure map and persuades a guide (Juan Chasquisdo) to accompany him in his search to recover it. Both are pursued by bandits.

programme.title: Guns Of Diablo 1964
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as rugged scout Linc Murdock, caught in a feud with rancher Rance Macklin over the enchanting Maria. Packed with action, rivalry, and frontier grit, this Western drama also showcases a young Kurt Russell in one of his earliest roles!

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You
programme.desc: This sequel to the popular spaghetti western "Clint the Stranger" was released four years after the success of the first film and essentially uses the same plot. George Martin returns as Clint (renamed Trinity in some countries), an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. One major differences in the plot when compared to the first film is the addition of Klaus Kinski as a ruthless bounty hunter. The bounty hunter tracks Clint down and forces him to return to his violent ways to protect himself and his family.
